name: Aggregate Pure and Mixture Chemical Quantities
description:
The Oakline Furniture Mfg facility is finalizing its annual EPCRA Tier II report. An internal EHS audit revealed that in addition to the 8,000 lbs of pure Toluene in a bulk tank, the facility also stores 4,000 lbs of Toluene contained within proprietary wood stain mixtures in drums. To comply with EPA aggregation rules, you must update the existing Toluene record (CAS 108-88-3) to reflect the combined quantities. Using EPA Tier2 Submit (already open), open the facility record from C:\Tier2Submit\Data\oakline_2025.t2s. Update the Toluene record as follows:

1. Update Maximum Daily Amount to 12,000 lbs and its Range Code to 05 (10,000 - 24,999 lbs).
2. Update Average Daily Amount to 9,000 lbs and verify its Range Code remains 04 (1,000 - 9,999 lbs).
3. Keep the existing 'Main Solvent Tank' storage location unchanged.
4. Add a secondary storage location for the stain drums with Type: 'Drum', Pressure: 'Ambient pressure', Temperature: 'Ambient temperature', and Location Description: 'Paint Mixing Room - Stain Drums'.

Save the facility record to persist the changes to C:\Tier2Submit\Data\oakline_2025.t2s.
